title: Kirrak Party
overview: Krishna is a happy-go-lucky first year engineering student with not a care in life. He falls in love with his senior Meera who’s a do-gooder and urges him to tap into the unseen side of him. But what happens when an unforeseen incident brings a change in him that even she couldn’t predict?
